title: lallemantia iberica
intro: Lallemantia iberica, also known as Iberis amara or bitter candytuft, is a flowering plant native to the Caucasus region. It is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Lallemantia iberica include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and boost the immune system. Lallemantia iberica can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, including respiratory issues and skin conditions.
